## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Diligent and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, updates, and optimizations.](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content opportunities from education/templates team; phased project starting late October](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Focus on content refreshes showing positive results; continuing this strategy](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Technical SEO optimizations for AI/LLM visibility being explored](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Upcoming Diligent Institute reports (Transaction Readiness, What Directors Think) to leverage for content](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [ERN data cleanup ongoing; interim solution of high-level categorization overview to be shared](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Education/templates team pushing for more top-of-funnel content visibility](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Three-tiered approach: free, gated, and paid content](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [Opportunity to leverage existing templates, policies, and videos](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Focus on content refreshes over net new content](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [Refreshing posts from 2021-2022 showing traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Cyber risk campaign content opportunities being explored](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

### Content Creation Best Practices

  - [Use branded image library for blog post images](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Author list for net new content being compiled](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Interim solution: use Keisha as author](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [SME quotes and external linking to authority sources beneficial](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Implement breadcrumbs for proper content categorization](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Improve readability with spacing between H2 headers](https://fathom.video/share/8gzEhxafs6MoZ_UiC9YEgnzmDdFeKRzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
